title: marcellia prostrata
intro: Marcellia prostrata, also known as creeping marcellia, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Marcellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Marcellia prostrata include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it has also been used to help reduce the risk of certain diseases. Marcellia prostrata can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or it can be used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
